title: On the Bright Side
excerpt: At first I was a bit unsure of using fuchsia cardstock as a base, but this layout came together and I quite like the brightness and vibrancy. It's perfect for summer. And I cannot believe I will have soon lived…
body:
At first I was a bit unsure of using fuchsia cardstock as a base, but this layout came together and I quite like the brightness and vibrancy. It's perfect for summer. And I cannot believe I will have soon lived in LA for 9 years.

// Copyright Two Peas In A Bucket //

Another bright layout was posted to the gallery a few weeks ago from our trip to Kauai last fall. Decided to follow the lines of the yellow paper to make the circle of punched circles.

// Copyright Two Peas In A Bucket // 

On another bright note, new October Afternoon, Jillibean Soup (my favorite are the new Alphabeans in kraft & white) and Bella Blvd just hit Two Peas, in case you needed a reason to brighten your day.
